mechanics.excerpt: Cnaracters must make Perception Check at +4 TN penalty to successfully notice someone using JAF-05 (the penalty negated tne character making the roll is using a infrared detector; as the JAF-05 cannot mask the weapon heat signa ture). Telescopic Scope Sometimes called sniper scopes these magnify much like pair binoculars or standard telescope.
